name: cilium-cli
title: cilium-cli
description:
Cilium CLI (program)
This package contains a CLI to install, manage & troubleshoot Kubernetes
clusters running Cilium.

commands.name: cilium
commands.description: CLI to install, manage, & troubleshooting Cilium clusters running Kubernetes.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cilium because Cilium CLI (program).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cilium as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cilium [options] [args]` as documented upstream for cilium.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cilium with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cilium --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
